pageSubtitle: A living public-record map for entity pages, weekly source checks, and reader navigation.
boundary: Atlas entries are navigation leads, not accusations. Every relationship must be labelled by evidence type.

layers.title: People
layers.definition: Public institutional actors and leadership figures.
layers.updateRule: Refresh official leadership and office pages weekly.

entries.name: Donald J. Trump
entries.why: Executive-power node for appointments, foreign policy, military command, sanctions, regulation, and national-security direction.
entries.updateRule: Refresh weekly from the official White House administration page.

entries.name: António Guterres
entries.why: Global institution node for diplomacy, humanitarian response, migration, development, conflict statements, and UN reform debate.
entries.updateRule: Refresh weekly from the official UN Secretary-General page.

entries.name: Larry Fink
entries.why: Finance node for asset management, market influence, stewardship policy, pension exposure, and institutional capital maps.
entries.updateRule: Refresh weekly from BlackRock leadership page.

entries.name: John G. Roberts, Jr.
entries.role: Chief Justice of the United States
entries.why: Judicial-power node for constitutional rulings, agency power, election law, executive authority, and federal court administration.
entries.updateRule: Refresh weekly from Supreme Court current members page.

entries.name: Ursula von der Leyen
entries.why: EU executive node for regulation, sanctions, defence policy, digital rules, industrial policy, funding, and health-policy oversight.
entries.updateRule: Refresh weekly from the official European Commission president page.

layers.title: Institutions
layers.definition: Agencies, banks, foundations, courts, universities, media groups, contractors, and standards bodies.
layers.updateRule: Refresh official institution pages, reports, and leadership pages weekly.

entries.name: Central Intelligence Agency
entries.why: Source lane for declassified files, oversight records, agency history, contractors, and intelligence-reader routes.
entries.updateRule: Refresh weekly from official agency and reading-room pages.

entries.name: National Security Agency
entries.why: Source lane for surveillance, cyber security, cryptography, metadata, and oversight boundaries.
entries.updateRule: Refresh weekly from official agency pages.

entries.name: International Monetary Fund
entries.why: Finance lane for sovereign debt, surveillance reports, crisis lending, and macro policy pressure.
entries.updateRule: Refresh weekly from IMF official pages and reports.

entries.name: World Bank Group
entries.why: Funding lane for infrastructure, poverty programs, food stress, reconstruction, and development policy.
entries.updateRule: Refresh weekly from World Bank official pages and project data.

entries.name: Supreme Court of the United States
entries.why: Legal-record lane for constitutional power, rights cases, agency limits, election law, and public judgments.
entries.updateRule: Refresh weekly from Supreme Court official pages.

layers.title: Operations
layers.definition: Public investigations, trials, programs, sanctions, and policy lanes.
layers.updateRule: Refresh public investigation, document release, court, policy, and sanctions lanes weekly.

entries.name: Epstein public-record releases
entries.why: Tracks public records while separating contact, allegation, witness, victim, employee, defendant, and conviction categories.
entries.updateRule: Refresh weekly from court records, official releases, and evidence-watch data.

entries.name: Declassification and FOIA releases
entries.why: Tracks newly released records, redactions, oversight files, court exhibits, and archive updates.
entries.updateRule: Refresh weekly from reading rooms, archives, FOIA lanes, and court exhibits.

entries.name: AI regulation and compute concentration
entries.why: Tracks regulation, model releases, safety institutions, export controls, chip supply, infrastructure, and lobbying.
entries.updateRule: Refresh weekly from regulator, standards-body, company, and public hearing sources.

entries.name: Procurement and contractor lanes
entries.why: Tracks contracts, outsourcing, vendor concentration, oversight gaps, and revolving-door records.
entries.updateRule: Refresh weekly from procurement databases, regulator releases, and contractor disclosures.

entries.name: Sanctions and crisis-policy lanes
entries.why: Tracks official sanctions programs, emergency powers, supply-chain impact, and public crisis response.
entries.updateRule: Refresh weekly from official sanctions pages, government statements, and Live Intel source lanes.

layers.title: Money Flows
layers.definition: Contracts, grants, donations, lobbying, fines, settlements, and public funding lanes.
layers.updateRule: Refresh contract, grant, lobbying, regulator, and settlement lanes weekly.

layers.title: Legal Records
layers.definition: Court records, hearings, exhibits, judgments, official releases, and regulator findings.
layers.updateRule: Refresh court, hearing, regulator, archive, and release lanes weekly.

layers.title: Symbolic Layer
layers.definition: Public logos, patches, architecture, language systems, and symbolism.
layers.updateRule: Refresh official visual records and keep interpretation clearly labelled.

layers.title: Human Cost
layers.definition: Public datasets showing the real-world impact of policy, war, finance, health, and institutional failure.
layers.updateRule: Refresh official public-impact datasets weekly and keep category boundaries visible.
